name: ColorMyWorld v1.3.0
description: A creative tool to generate personalized children's coloring books using AI, powered by Next.js.
techStack: Next.js 14 (App Router), Tailwind CSS v4, TypeScript, Google GenAI SDK

architecture.aiIntegration: @google/genai SDK (Client-side - keys bundled at build time via NEXT_PUBLIC_*)

rules: Ensure all files have version headers
